mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 80步达上限被终止。页面无 Observable.zip 入口，仅有 HTTP/Router/Core/Material 四个 demo 模块和对应 Load 按钮。Step 8-11 尝试点击 Load 按钮，请求完成太快（localhost）无法观察 loading bar 行为。Step 29-39 跑偏到 VS Code Terminal 中查找源码试图理解 Observable.zip 用法，但未能成功触发目标场景。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tried to find Observable.zip functionality on the demo page but it doesn't exist. HTTP requests complete too fast on localhost to observe loading bar behavior. mano-cua went off-track exploring VS Code and Terminal.

deploy_notes: commit 3cb197d9a1 uses node-sass 4.7.2. Fixed with dart-sass shim. Dev server on port 4501.
